antipattern.symptom: Approve verdict with empty comments list AND a diff > 200 lines.
antipattern.root-cause: Reviewer (human or agent) approves without reading; cycle-time KPI dominates.
antipattern.fix: Reject approve unless either diff < 30 lines OR at least one comment exists. Force the reviewer to demonstrate engagement.

antipattern.symptom: Review posts > 20 comments; nitpicks not batched.
antipattern.root-cause: Reviewer treats lint warnings as comments instead of asking CI to lint.
antipattern.fix: Lint warnings → CI annotations, not review comments. Batch any residual nits into one 'nits' comment.

antipattern.symptom: Categories object missing one of the six required keys.
antipattern.root-cause: Reviewer skipped a category they don't usually look at (e.g. security).
antipattern.fix: Schema rejects the report; force re-draft with explicit 'na' if the category truly does not apply.
Block. Require at least one human approver on the merge protection rules.
